seo.title: Goindhammavala Song Lyrics From Vada Chennai
seo.description: Full Goindhammavaala songs lyrics, Vada Chennai Songs Lyrics. sharable lyrics snippets, Lyrics: Dhanush, Music: Santhosh Narayanan,.
seo.keywords: Dhanush, Rokesh, Vada Chennai, Santhosh Narayanan, Goindhammavaala full lyrics, Vada Chennai songs lyrics, Goindhammavaala lyrics snippets, Goindhammavaala WhatsApp status lyrics snippets, share Goindhammavaala lyrics snippets with friends, Tamil lyrics, Tamil songs

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Goindhammavala?

The song Goindhammavala is a lively track that celebrates joy and festivity, often associated with dance and celebration in the movie Vada Chennai.

What is the plot context of the song in Vada Chennai?

In Vada Chennai, the song plays during a festive moment, highlighting the characters' camaraderie and the vibrant culture of the setting.

Who is the singer of Goindhammavala?

The singer of Goindhammavala is currently unknown, but the song features the creative talents of lyricist Dhanush and music director Santhosh Narayanan.

When was Goindhammavala released?

Goindhammavala was released on September 23, 2018, as part of the movie Vada Chennai.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Goindhammavala from Vada Chennai is a vibrant and energetic dance number that encapsulates the festive spirit of the film. It showcases the joy and camaraderie among characters, making it a perfect fit for celebrations and parties. The upbeat rhythm and catchy lyrics evoke a sense of happiness and excitement, inviting listeners to join in the fun. Overall, the song serves as a delightful highlight in the movie, enhancing its lively atmosphere.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Goindhammavala from Vada Chennai is an electrifying dance number that perfectly captures the vibrant spirit of celebration. With Dhanush's clever lyrics and Santhosh Narayanan's infectious beats, this track is sure to get everyone on their feet. Experience the joy and energy of this unique collaboration that brings a fresh vibe to Tamil cinema.

if you touch my heart, it will melt.
